hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容；【WORLD】伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普称以色列和黎巴嫩同意延长停火；【WORLD】华纳兄弟股东批准派拉蒙 1110 亿美元收购。

items.title: Here's what to expect from Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh's Senate hearing Tuesday
items.summary: In a much-anticipated hearing before the Banking Committee, the former Fed governor will face questioning over a variety of subjects
items.title_zh: 以下是美联储主席提名人凯文·沃什周二在参议院听证会上的预期内容
items.summary_zh: 在银行委员会备受期待的听证会上，前美联储理事将面临各种问题的质询

items.title: Iran War Live Updates: Trump Says Israel and Lebanon Agree to Extend Cease-Fire
items.summary: The president said the pause in fighting in Lebanon would last three more weeks. The tit-for-tat attacks between Israel and Hezbollah threatened to undermine efforts to settle the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争实时更新：特朗普称以色列和黎巴嫩同意延长停火
items.summary_zh: 总统表示，黎巴嫩的战斗暂停还将持续三周。以色列和真主党之间针锋相对的袭击可能会破坏解决伊朗战争的努力。

items.title: Warner Bros shareholders approve Paramount's $111bn takeover
items.summary: The approval came as Donald Trump is to attend a dinner with billionaire Paramount backers the Ellisons.
items.title_zh: 华纳兄弟股东批准派拉蒙 1110 亿美元收购
items.summary_zh: 这项批准是在唐纳德·特朗普将与亿万富翁派拉蒙公司的支持者埃里森家族共进晚宴之际获得批准的。

items.title: BIS warns cryptocurrency exchanges are becoming ‘shadow banks,’ and why that's a risk
items.summary: The Bank for International Settlements (BIS) released a report warning stablecoin yields and other DeFi “earn” products are bank-like services without the safeguards or insurance.
items.title_zh: 国际清算银行警告加密货币交易所正在成为“影子银行”，以及为什么这是一个风险
items.summary_zh: 国际清算银行（BIS）发布了一份报告，警告稳定币收益率和其他 DeFi“赚取”产品是类似银行的服务，没有保障或保险。

items.title: Ripple-linked XRP slips amid bitcoin profit-taking, ETF delay
items.summary: Token falls 2.5% after rejection near $1.44 as leveraged ETF launch pushback adds to mixed sentiment.
items.title_zh: 与瑞波币相关的 XRP 在比特币获利了结、ETF 延迟的情况下下滑
items.summary_zh: 由于杠杆 ETF 推出的阻力加剧了市场情绪的复杂性，代币在 1.44 美元附近遭到拒绝后下跌 2.5%。

items.title: JPMorgan says DeFi exploits and stagnant TVL continue to limit institutional appeal
items.summary: JPMorgan said persistent hacks appear to push investors toward Tether's USDT, as users move funds out of DeFi during stress.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，DeFi 漏洞和 TVL 停滞不前继续限制机构吸引力
items.summary_zh: 摩根大通表示，持续的黑客攻击似乎促使投资者转向 Tether 的 USDT，因为用户在压力下将资金从 DeFi 中转移出来。

items.title: Bitcoin ETF ‘flows turned positive for the year’: BNY’s global head of ETFs
items.summary: “Flows have turned positive for the year,” Global Head of ETFs at BNY Asset Servicing Ben Slavin told The Block.
items.title_zh: 纽约银行全球 ETF 主管：比特币 ETF“今年流量转正”
items.summary_zh: 纽约银行资产服务 ETF 全球主管 Ben Slavin 向 The Block 表示：“今年的资金流量已转为正值。”

items.title: ‘Rally on trial’: Bitcoin breakout faces key $80,000 test as whales, ETF investors buy into volatility
items.summary: Analysts say bitcoin's rally still faces a stiff test from profit-taking, macro risk and a crowded resistance zone.
items.title_zh: “试验中的反弹”：随着鲸鱼和 ETF 投资者买入波动性，比特币突破面临 80,000 美元的关键考验
items.summary_zh: 分析师表示，比特币的反弹仍面临获利回吐、宏观风险和拥挤阻力区的严峻考验。

items.title: Jacob Andreas and Brett McGuire named Edgerton Award winners
items.summary: The associate professors of EECS and chemistry, respectively, are honored for exceptional contributions to teaching, research, and service at MIT.
items.title_zh: 雅各布·安德烈亚斯和布雷特·麦奎尔被评为埃哲顿奖获得者
items.summary_zh: EECS 和化学副教授分别因对麻省理工学院的教学、研究和服务做出的杰出贡献而受到表彰。

items.title: Human-machine teaming dives underwater
items.summary: Researchers are developing hardware and algorithms to improve collaboration between divers and autonomous underwater vehicles engaged in maritime missions.
items.title_zh: 人机协作潜入水下
items.summary_zh: 研究人员正在开发硬件和算法，以改善潜水员和执行海上任务的自主水下航行器之间的协作。

items.title: Helping data centers deliver higher performance with less hardware
items.summary: Researchers developed a system that intelligently balances workloads to improve the efficiency of flash storage hardware in a data center.
items.title_zh: 帮助数据中心以更少的硬件提供更高的性能
items.summary_zh: 研究人员开发了一种智能平衡工作负载的系统，以提高数据中心闪存存储硬件的效率。

items.title: NYC Mayor Mamdani knocked Ken Griffin in pied-a-terre tax promo. His firm calls the move 'shameful'
items.summary: Chief Operating Officer Gerald Beeson saying in a memo that targeting Griffin showed "ignorance and disdain" toward contributors to the city's economy.
items.title_zh: 纽约市市长马姆达尼在临时税收促销活动中击败了肯·格里芬。他的公司称此举“可耻”
items.summary_zh: 首席运营官杰拉尔德·比森(Gerald Beeson)在一份备忘录中表示，针对格里芬表现出对该市经济贡献者的“无知和蔑视”。

items.title: Traders are betting on big moves in Intel on earnings
items.summary: Semiconductor stocks are powering the U.S. equity market to records and traders are predicting that means a big swing in shares of Intel after earnings tonight.
items.title_zh: 交易员押注英特尔盈利的重大变动
items.summary_zh: 半导体股正在推动美国股市创下历史新高，交易员预测这意味着今晚公布财报后英特尔股价将出现大幅波动。

items.title: Kalshi traders don't see Strait of Hormuz traffic returning to normal until July
items.summary: Chances that traffic returns to normal fell below 50% on Wednesday, according to Kalshi bettors, despite the U.S. and Iran extending the ceasefire.
items.title_zh: 卡尔希贸易商预计霍尔木兹海峡交通要到七月才能恢复正常
items.summary_zh: 据 Kalshi 投注者称，尽管美国和伊朗延长了停火期限，但周三交通恢复正常的可能性仍低于 50%。

items.title: Bessent says 'many' U.S. allies have asked for currency swaps amid Iran war turbulence
items.summary: The White House on Tuesday said the UAE had not requested a currency swap line.
items.title_zh: 贝森特表示，在伊朗战争动荡期间，“许多”美国盟友已要求进行货币互换
items.summary_zh: 白宫周二表示，阿联酋没有要求货币互换额度。

items.title: Trump administration discussing currency swap line with United Arab Emirates
items.summary: Such a move would provide liquidity in dollars to the oil-rich UAE, but could be politically tenuous for the administration amid higher prices at home.
items.title_zh: 特朗普政府与阿拉伯联合酋长国讨论货币互换额度
items.summary_zh: 此举将为石油资源丰富的阿联酋提供美元流动性，但由于国内油价上涨，对政府来说可能在政治上脆弱。

items.title: JPMorgan expands $1.5 trillion economic security splurge into Europe
items.summary: The banking giant is looking to invest in areas deemed critical to economic security, including defense and AI.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通将 1.5 万亿美元的经济安全投资扩大到欧洲
items.summary_zh: 这家银行巨头正在寻求投资对经济安全至关重要的领域，包括国防和人工智能。

items.title: In Tehran, money is short and a return to war looms over daily life
items.summary: The BBC's Lyse Doucet reports from Iran, where the buzz of busy shopping streets masks deep uncertainty over the country's future.
items.title_zh: 在德黑兰，资金短缺，日常生活中战争的重演迫在眉睫
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的 Lyse Doucet 从伊朗报道，那里繁忙的购物街掩盖了该国未来的巨大不确定性。

items.title: US-Kuwaiti journalist held in Kuwait over social media posts acquitted, lawyers say
items.summary: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin reportedly faced charges, including spreading false information, after he re-posted images related to the Iran war.
items.title_zh: 律师称，因社交媒体帖子而在科威特被关押的美国科威特记者被无罪释放
items.summary_zh: 据报道，艾哈迈德·谢哈布-埃尔丁在转发与伊朗战争有关的图片后面临包括散布虚假信息在内的指控。

items.title: $106 Billion Loan Reflects E.U.’s View That Peace in Ukraine Is Far Away
items.summary: Unlike previous European assistance packages, this one is heavily weighted toward military spending, meant to put Ukraine on solid footing for a long fight.
items.title_zh: 1060亿美元贷款反映出欧盟认为乌克兰的和平还很遥远
items.summary_zh: 与之前的欧洲援助计划不同，这一计划的重点是军事支出，旨在为乌克兰奠定长期战斗的基础。

items.title: Afghans Who Helped U.S. Forces Say They’re Being Pushed Back to the Taliban
items.summary: Once promised a move to the United States, Afghan refugees who helped U.S. forces say they face ‘bad or worse’ options: resettlement to Congo or returning home to live under the Taliban.
items.title_zh: 帮助美军的阿富汗人称他们被推回塔利班
items.summary_zh: 一旦承诺移居美国，帮助美军的阿富汗难民表示，他们面临“糟糕或更糟糕”的选择：重新安置到刚果或返回家园在塔利班统治下生活。

items.title: Journalist Detained in Kuwait After Posting About Iran War Is Acquitted
items.summary: Ahmed Shihab-Eldin, a Kuwaiti-American journalist, is expected to be released soon, after 52 days in detention, a lawyer for two of his family members said.
items.title_zh: 发表有关伊朗战争的文章后在科威特被拘留的记者被无罪释放
items.summary_zh: 科威特裔美国记者艾哈迈德·希哈卜·埃尔丁 (Ahmed Shihab-Eldin) 两名家人的律师表示，他在被拘留 52 天后预计很快就会获释。

items.title: War in Iran Gives New Fuel to a Tax Debate in Australia
items.summary: The world’s third-largest exporter of natural gas, Australia has been too lenient in taxing lucrative gas exports, many in the country argue.
items.title_zh: 伊朗战争为澳大利亚税收辩论注入新动力
items.summary_zh: 许多澳大利亚人认为，作为世界第三大天然气出口国，澳大利亚对利润丰厚的天然气出口征税过于宽松。

items.title: Aave rallies DeFi partners to contain fallout from $292 million KelpDAO hack
items.summary: Industry players are coordinating a recovery effort as the year's biggest crypto theft rattled Aave, with Lido and EtherFi being firsts to offer aid.
items.title_zh: Aave 召集 DeFi 合作伙伴遏制 KelpDAO 黑客攻击造成的 2.92 亿美元损失
items.summary_zh: 今年最大的加密货币盗窃案令 Aave 感到不安，行业参与者正在协调恢复工作，Lido 和 EtherFi 率先提供了援助。

items.title: Tether freezes $344 million in USDT on Tron tied to 'illicit activity'
items.summary: The stablecoin issuer said the action followed U.S. law enforcement requests as global watchdog FATF warned of growing role of digital dollars in illicit money flows.
items.title_zh: Tether 冻结 Tron 上与“非法活动”相关的 3.44 亿美元 USDT
items.summary_zh: 这家稳定币发行人表示，此举是根据美国执法部门的要求而采取的，因为全球监管机构 FATF 警告称，数字美元在非法资金流动中的作用越来越大。

items.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: Uniswap (UNI) drops 3.9%, leading index lower
items.summary: Ethereum (ETH), down 2.9% since Wednesday, was also an underperformer.
items.title_zh: CoinDesk 20 业绩更新：Uniswap (UNI) 下跌 3.9%，领先指数走低
items.summary_zh: 以太坊 (ETH) 自周三以来下跌 2.9%，表现也不佳。

items.title: Paradigm-backed Succinct launches iPhone camera app that combats AI fakes using cryptography
items.summary: Succinct cited research predicting that generative AI could cause fraud losses to hit $40 billion in the U.S. by 2027.
items.title_zh: Paradigm 支持的 Succinct 推出 iPhone 相机应用程序，利用加密技术对抗 AI 造假
items.summary_zh: Succinct 援引研究预测，到 2027 年，生成式 AI 可能导致美国的欺诈损失达到 400 亿美元。

items.title: Introducing GPT-5.5
items.summary: Introducing GPT-5.5, our smartest model yet—faster, more capable, and built for complex tasks like coding, research, and data analysis across tools.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GPT-5.5，这是我们迄今为止最智能的模型，速度更快、功能更强大，专为跨工具编码、研究和数据分析等复杂任务而构建。

items.title: GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty
items.summary: Explore the GPT-5.5 Bio Bug Bounty: a red-teaming challenge to find universal jailbreaks for bio safety risks, with rewards up to $25,000.
items.title_zh: GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金
items.summary_zh: 探索 GPT-5.5 生物错误赏金：一项红队挑战，旨在寻找生物安全风险的通用越狱方法，奖励高达 25,000 美元。

items.title: 3 new ways Ads Advisor is making Google Ads safer and faster
items.summary: Three new agentic safety and policy features integrated into Ads Advisor will help protect and streamline your Google Ads account.
items.title_zh: Ads Advisor 让 Google Ads 更安全、更快速的 3 种新方法
items.summary_zh: Ads Advisor 中集成的三项新的代理安全和政策功能将有助于保护和简化您的 Google Ads 帐户。

items.title: New ways to create personalized images in the Gemini app
items.summary: Nano Banana 2 now uses your personal context and Google Photos to create images that reflect your unique life.
items.title_zh: 在 Gemini 应用程序中创建个性化图像的新方法
items.summary_zh: Nano Banana 2 现在使用您的个人背景和 Google Photos 来创建反映您独特生活的图像。

items.title: Bringing AI-driven protein-design tools to biologists everywhere
items.summary: Founded by Tristan Bepler PhD ’20 and former MIT professor Tim Lu PhD ’07, OpenProtein.AI offers researchers open-source models and other tools for protein engineering.
items.title_zh: 为世界各地的生物学家带来人工智能驱动的蛋白质设计工具
items.summary_zh: OpenProtein.AI 由 Tristan Bepler 博士 '20 和前麻省理工学院教授 Tim Lu 博士 '07 创立，为研究人员提供开源模型和其他蛋白质工程工具。

items.title: New technique makes AI models leaner and faster while they’re still learning
items.summary: Researchers use control theory to shed unnecessary complexity from AI models during training, cutting compute costs without sacrificing performance.
items.title_zh: 新技术使人工智能模型在学习过程中变得更精简、更快
items.summary_zh: 研究人员利用控制理论在训练过程中消除人工智能模型不必要的复杂性，在不牺牲性能的情况下降低计算成本。

items.title: Crash That Killed 2 Americans Is a Reminder of the Depth of Security Ties in Mexico
items.summary: The deaths of two C.I.A. officers in a crash in northern Mexico sparked questions about authorization and sovereignty, but also reflected a longstanding, sensitive security partnership between the two countries.
items.title_zh: 造成 2 名美国人死亡的车祸提醒人们墨西哥安全关系的深度
items.summary_zh: 两名中央情报局人员的死亡墨西哥北部发生的一起坠机事件引发了有关授权和主权的质疑，但也反映出两国之间长期、敏感的安全伙伴关系。

items.title: The $145 billion math: Why bitcoin’s quantum threat is manageable, not existential
items.summary: Quantum fears focus on vulnerable early wallets, but market data suggests even a worst case sell-off would be large, not catastrophic.
items.title_zh: 1450 亿美元的数学：为什么比特币的量子威胁是可控的，而不是存在的
items.summary_zh: 量子担忧主要集中在脆弱的早期钱包上，但市场数据表明，即使是最坏的情况下，抛售也将是大规模的，而不是灾难性的。

items.title: Bitmine’s ETH staking passes 70% of holdings after latest $320 million push
items.summary: Ethereum treasury firm Bitmine has staked roughly 3.5 million ETH, worth more than $8 billion, out of its roughly 5.08 million ETH holdings.
items.title_zh: 在最新 3.2 亿美元的推动下，Bitmine 的 ETH 持仓量已超过 70%
items.summary_zh: 以太坊财务公司 Bitmine 已持有约 508 万枚 ETH，其中持有约 350 万枚 ETH，价值超过 80 亿美元。

items.title: Training and Finetuning Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 使用句子变压器训练和微调多模态嵌入和重排序模型

items.title: Multimodal Embedding & Reranker Models with Sentence Transformers
items.title_zh: 带有句子变压器的多模态嵌入和重新排序模型

items.title: We're launching two specialized TPUs for the agentic era.
items.summary: The eighth generation of Google’s TPU includes two specialized chips that will power the future of AI.
items.title_zh: 我们正在推出两款针对代理时代的专用 TPU。
items.summary_zh: 第八代谷歌 TPU 包括两个专用芯片，将为人工智能的未来提供动力。

items.title: A new way to explore the web with AI Mode in Chrome
items.summary: Today’s upgrades for AI Mode in Chrome transform how you interact with the web
items.title_zh: 通过 Chrome 中的 AI 模式探索网络的新方式
items.summary_zh: 今天 Chrome 中 AI 模式的升级改变了您与网络交互的方式

items.title: Teaching AI models to say “I’m not sure”
items.summary: A new training method improves the reliability of AI confidence estimates without sacrificing performance, addressing a root cause of hallucination in reasoning models.
items.title_zh: 教人工智能模型说“我不确定”
items.summary_zh: 一种新的训练方法在不牺牲性能的情况下提高了人工智能置信度估计的可靠性，解决了推理模型中产生幻觉的根本原因。

items.title: A philosophy of work
items.summary: As the NC Ethics of Technology Postdoctoral Fellow, Michal Masny is advancing dialogue, teaching, and research into the social and ethical dimensions of new computing technologies.
items.title_zh: 工作哲学
items.summary_zh: 作为北卡罗来纳州技术伦理学博士后研究员，Michal Masny 正在推进新计算技术的社会和伦理层面的对话、教学和研究。

items.title: Risky meme trading is back. A trading rule change may have lit the fuse
items.summary: A regulatory shift is expected to remove barriers to rapid-fire trading and help revive a meme-stock frenzy.
items.title_zh: 高风险的模因交易又回来了。交易规则的改变可能点燃了导火索
items.summary_zh: 监管的转变预计将消除快速交易的障碍，并有助于重振迷因股票的狂热。

items.title: Volkswagen announces voice AI in its Chinese cars from later this year
items.summary: Volkswagen revealed four cars, including the ID. UNYX 09, which the company said it co-developed with EV maker Xpeng in two years.
items.title_zh: 大众汽车宣布今年晚些时候将在其中国汽车中配备语音人工智能
items.summary_zh: 大众汽车发布了四款汽车，其中包括 ID. UNYX 09，该公司表示，该产品是与电动汽车制造商小鹏汽车在两年内共同开发的。

items.title: AST SpaceMobile shares drop after its satellite is placed in wrong orbit by Bezos' Blue Origin
items.summary: Blue Origin acknowledged the satellite was placed in the wrong orbit, but has not commented since it was deemed lost.
items.title_zh: 贝索斯的蓝色起源将 AST SpaceMobile 的卫星送入错误轨道后，其股价下跌
items.summary_zh: 蓝色起源承认这颗卫星被放置在错误的轨道上，但由于被认为丢失而没有发表评论。

items.title: Trump tells BBC that King's visit could 'absolutely' help repair relations with UK
items.summary: In a phone interview with the BBC's North America editor, the president discussed next week's visit and his relationship with the UK PM.
items.title_zh: 特朗普告诉BBC，金的访问“绝对”有助于修复与英国的关系
items.summary_zh: 在接受英国广播公司北美编辑的电话采访时，总统讨论了下周的访问以及他与英国首相的关系。

items.title: Huge chunk of glacier blocks Everest route in peak climbing season
items.summary: Sherpas cannot prepare the route to the world's highest peak because a huge block of ice is in the way.
items.title_zh: 攀登高峰季节，巨大的冰川阻挡了珠穆朗玛峰的路线
items.summary_zh: 夏尔巴人无法准备通往世界最高峰的路线，因为路上有一块巨大的冰块。

items.title: More than 500 people killed in Tanzania election violence, inquiry finds
items.summary: Opposition parties accused security forces but the official report does not say who was responsible.
items.title_zh: 调查发现坦桑尼亚选举暴力事件造成500多人死亡
items.summary_zh: 反对党指责安全部队，但官方报告没有说明谁应对此负责。

items.title: US Navy chief leaving post 'effective immediately', Pentagon says
items.summary: Reports say Phelan, whose role was largely administrative, left amid tension over US shipbuilding.
items.title_zh: 五角大楼表示，美国海军司令离职“立即生效”
items.summary_zh: 报道称，费兰的职责主要是行政性的，他在美国造船业的紧张局势中离职。

items.title: South African police chief suspended over $20m health contract
items.summary: Cyril Ramaphosa said the suspension was because of the critical role Fannie Masemola plays in fighting crime.
items.title_zh: 南非警察局长暂停价值2000万美元的医疗合同
items.summary_zh: 西里尔·拉马福萨表示，此次停职是因为房利美·马塞莫拉在打击犯罪方面发挥了关键作用。

items.title: Two trains collide head-on in Denmark, leaving five critically hurt
items.summary: The accident happened early on Thursday at a level crossing north of Copenhagen.
items.title_zh: 丹麦两列火车迎头相撞，造成五人重伤
items.summary_zh: 这起事故于周四早些时候发生在哥本哈根北部的一个平交道口。

items.title: MrBeast's company sued by ex-employee over sexual harassment claim
items.summary: Beast Industries has strongly denied claims of sexual harassment and workplace gender bias.
items.title_zh: MrBeast 的公司因性骚扰被前雇员起诉
items.summary_zh: Beast Industries 强烈否认有关性骚扰和工作场所性别偏见的指控。

items.title: The Generals Who Are Now Running Iran
items.summary: The killing of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei ushered in a new form of collective leadership in the country, with more power for the Revolutionary Guards.
items.title_zh: 现在统治伊朗的将军们
items.summary_zh: 阿亚图拉阿里·哈梅内伊的遇害开启了该国新的集体领导形式，革命卫队获得了更多权力。

items.title: Touring Africa, Pope Leo Raised His Voice, but Didn’t Like the Echo
items.summary: On his recent trip abroad, Leo XIV made some of his most forthright comments since becoming pope last year, but grew uncomfortable at how that criticism was interpreted.
items.title_zh: 非洲之行，教皇利奥提高声音，但不喜欢回声
items.summary_zh: 在最近的出国访问中，利奥十四世发表了自去年成为教皇以来最直率的一些评论，但对这些批评的解释方式感到不安。

items.title: Will Bulgaria’s New Leader Cast His Lot With Europe or Russia?
items.summary: With a record of pro-Russia statements, Rumen Radev handily won elections this week. Now Bulgarians and his E.U. partners wait to see which way he will turn.
items.title_zh: 保加利亚新领导人会选择欧洲还是俄罗斯？
items.summary_zh: 凭借亲俄声明的记录，鲁门·拉德夫轻松赢得了本周的选举。现在保加利亚人和他的欧盟。伙伴们等着看他会转向哪个方向。

items.title: Tanzania Report Blames ‘Outside Forces’ for Deadly Election Violence
items.summary: The findings in a new report by a commission appointed by the government were at odds with details from human rights groups, which estimate that hundreds and possibly thousands of people were killed.
items.title_zh: 坦桑尼亚报告将致命的选举暴力归咎于“外部力量”
items.summary_zh: 政府任命的一个委员会在一份新报告中的调查结果与人权组织提供的细节不一致，后者估计有数百人甚至可能数千人被杀。

items.title: Inside the $71 million freeze on Arbitrum that has the crypto world questioning what decentralization really means
items.summary: The emergency response prevented stolen funds from moving, but sparked debate over governance, control and the limits of decentralization on Layer 2s.
items.title_zh: Arbitrum 冻结 7100 万美元，加密世界质疑去中心化的真正含义
items.summary_zh: 紧急响应阻止了被盗资金的转移，但引发了有关第 2 层治理、控制和去中心化限制的争论。

items.title: The market repriced DeFi in just 48 hours
items.summary: Di Bartolomeo argues that last weekend the market achieved – in real time – a notable feat that no regulator, auditor or commentator has ever done.
items.title_zh: 市场在短短 48 小时内重新定价 DeFi
items.summary_zh: 迪巴托洛梅奥认为，上周末市场实时实现了一项监管机构、审计师或评论员从未做过的显着壮举。

items.title: Crypto for Advisors: AI Agents Using Crypto
items.summary: AI agents are executing transactions, forming “agentic finance.” Crypto is the financial backend for these autonomous systems. Learn use cases, risks, and what experts say.
items.title_zh: 顾问的加密货币：使用加密货币的人工智能代理
items.summary_zh: 人工智能代理正在执行交易，形成“代理金融”。加密货币是这些自治系统的金融后端。了解用例、风险以及专家的说法。

items.title: JPMorgan says persistent security flaws curb DeFi’s institutional appeal
items.summary: A $20 billion hit from the KelpDAO exploit highlights systemic risks, while flat ETH-denominated growth and a shift to stablecoins point to ongoing fragility in DeFi.
items.title_zh: 摩根大通表示，持续存在的安全缺陷抑制了 DeFi 的机构吸引力
items.summary_zh: KelpDAO 漏洞造成的 200 亿美元损失突显了系统性风险，而以 ETH 计价的增长持平和向稳定币的转变则表明 DeFi 持续脆弱。

items.title: Jane Street asks court to dismiss Terraform Labs’ insider trading lawsuit
items.summary: Terraform Labs accused Jane Street of precipitating the collapse of the UST/LUNA algorithmic stablecoin through insider trading.
items.title_zh: Jane Street 请求法院驳回 Terraform Labs 的内幕交易诉讼
items.summary_zh: Terraform Labs 指责 Jane Street 通过内幕交易加速了 UST/LUNA 算法稳定币的崩溃。

items.title: Lido proposes allocating up to $5.8 million in staked ETH to back Kelp exploit shortfall
items.summary: The proposal follows last week's roughly $292-million exploit that hit Kelp DAO’s rsETH bridge,
items.title_zh: Lido 建议分配高达 580 万美元的质押 ETH，以支持 Kelp 漏洞利用缺口
items.summary_zh: 该提案是在上周 Kelp DAO 的 rsETH 桥上遭受约 2.92 亿美元的攻击之后提出的。

items.title: 3F, built on Morpho, raises $4 million to offer leveraged exposure to tokenized assets
items.summary: 3F has raised $4 million in funding led by Maven 11, with participation from Fidelity-affiliated F-Prime, GSR, and others.
items.title_zh: 基于 Morpho 的 3F 融资 400 万美元，提供代币化资产的杠杆敞口
items.summary_zh: 3F 已筹集 400 万美元资金，由 Maven 11 领投，富达旗下的 F-Prime、GSR 等参与其中。

items.title: US sanctions Cambodian senator alleged to be behind crypto scam centers as crackdown widens
items.summary: Over 500 "fraudulent web domains used to perpetuate cryptocurrency investment fraud" were also seized, OFAC said.
items.title_zh: 随着打击力度的扩大，美国对涉嫌加密诈骗中心幕后黑手的柬埔寨参议员实施制裁
items.summary_zh: OFAC 表示，还查获了 500 多个“用于实施加密货币投资欺诈的欺诈性网络域名”。

items.title: MegaETH hits first KPI with 10 apps live, starts seven-day MEGA token countdown
items.summary: MegaETH tied 53.3% of its total token supply to performance-based KPIs rather than fixed time-based vesting schedules.
items.title_zh: MegaETH 通过 10 个上线应用达到第一个 KPI，开始 7 天 MEGA 代币倒计时
items.summary_zh: MegaETH 将其总代币供应量的 53.3% 与基于绩效的 KPI 挂钩，而不是与基于时间的固定兑现时间表挂钩。

items.title: Q&A: MIT SHASS and the future of education in the age of AI

items.title_zh: 问答：MIT SHASS 和人工智能时代教育的未来
